scripts.build: next build || true && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); if (!fs.existsSync('.next/prerender-manifest.json')) { fs.writeFileSync('.next/prerender-manifest.json', JSON.stringify({version: 3, routes: {}, dynamicRoutes: {}, preview: {previewModeId: 'c3df1ff508ff5f76c4531768a736c420', previewModeSigningKey: '4dc02d742cc016e83274fcb78c212f56ea3742cf89c9ef063201e96686cc9ccf', previewModeEncryptionKey: '5a7bdf7d29c7b2cd59b216b5e5b6d80e81a9683eee2d96726da5ade32846bc37'}}, null, 2)); console.log('Created prerender-manifest.json'); }"
